About Dylan Stone

The quiet craft behind a great finish.

Dylan Stone Tiling is a tight-knit team servicing Newcastle, Port Stephens and the surrounding Hunter region. We specialise in every aspect of tiling and stonework — from luxury bathrooms and curved travertine showers to flagstone paths and outdoor stone cladding.

We take on work other tilers shy away from. Bullnose arches. Curved walls. Book-matched stone. Herringbone, stack bond, vertical brick. Wherever precision matters, that's where we want to be.

15+
Years Experience
200+
Projects Finished
5.0★
Client Rating
Services

Everything tile and stone.

From the first set-out to the final grout, every project is run by one of our lead tilers — no handing off, no cutting corners.

01 / Interior

Bathroom & Ensuite Tiling

Full bathroom tiling from slab to ceiling. Waterproofing, floors, walls, niches, benches — every detail planned, every cut dialled in.

02 / Feature

Showers & Feature Walls

Curved travertine showers, arched entries, herringbone splashbacks, vertical brick bond. The statement pieces your home deserves.

03 / Stone

Natural Stonework

Stone cladding, travertine, marble, limestone, sandstone. We source it, cut it, and install it to the standard natural stone demands.

04 / Outdoor

Flagstone & Paving

Crazy paving, flagstone paths, pool surrounds and alfresco floors. Outdoor stone that weathers beautifully and holds up for decades.

05 / Renovation

Kitchen & Laundry

Splashbacks, floors, and full wet-area renovations. Clean edges, tight grout lines, finishes that look like they grew there.

06 / Specialist

Cut & Polish Work

On-site mitring, bullnose edges, specialty cuts. The fine detail work that separates professional stone from a tile job.

Projects that speak for themselves.

How We Work

Simple, honest, no surprises.

We've refined our process over hundreds of projects. It's designed to keep things straightforward for you and the build running on schedule.

  1. 01

    Chat

    Call or message with what you've got in mind. We'll talk through scope, timing, and budget on the phone — no pressure, no sales pitch.

  2. 02

    Site Visit

    We come out, measure, look at your space and any inspiration photos you have. We'll flag anything to be aware of before you commit.

  3. 03

    Quote

    Clear, itemised quote sent through within a few days. What's included, what's not, and a realistic timeline. No hidden extras.

  4. 04

    Build

    We book you in and get to work. Clean site, respectful of your home, daily progress updates if you want them. Finished properly.
